# detectPatterns

> Find repetitive prompt patterns in LLM calls

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| db | Database | yes |
| start | string | yes |
| end | string | yes |
| minOccurrences | integer | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[duplicates: call detectDuplicates]
  A --> B[patterns: call createPattern]
  B --> C[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `Pattern[]`
